findings.name: false_blocks_resolved_by_intent_hotfix
findings.meaning: Negation-aware intent handling resolved prior false block candidates, but each newly allowed case still requires false-allow scan.

findings.name: direct_execution_blocks_preserved
findings.meaning: Direct execution requests remain blocked after the hotfix.

findings.name: over_conservative_review_candidates
findings.meaning: These cases should be reviewed for case-level reclassification, not global threshold mutation.

findings.name: false_allow_scan_required
findings.meaning: Allowed or warning outputs must be reviewed before any 50-case expansion.
